tests.name: test_reset
tests.description: Verify reset behavior initializes all outputs correctly
steps: Check wr_ptr, rd_ptr, rd_data, count_reg are zero
Release reset and verify stable operation
tests.expected: All pointers and count zero, empty asserted, full deasserted

tests.name: test_single_write
tests.description: Write single data item to empty FIFO

tests.name: test_single_read
tests.description: Read single data item from FIFO with one entry

tests.name: test_write_read_sequence
tests.description: Sequential write then read operations
tests.expected: Data read in same order as written

tests.name: test_fill_to_full
tests.description: Fill FIFO completely to DEPTH entries
tests.expected: full=1 when count=DEPTH, almost_full=1 at DEPTH-1

tests.name: test_drain_to_empty
tests.description: Drain FIFO completely from full state
steps: Fill FIFO, then read all entries
tests.expected: empty=1 when count=0, almost_empty=1 at count=1

tests.name: test_write_when_full
tests.description: Attempt write when FIFO is full (no concurrent read)
steps: Verify write is blocked, data preserved
tests.expected: No data corruption, count stays at DEPTH

tests.name: test_read_when_empty
tests.description: Attempt read when FIFO is empty (no concurrent write)
tests.expected: No pointer change, count stays at 0

tests.name: test_almost_full_threshold
tests.description: Verify almost_full flag at DEPTH-1
steps: Write one more, verify almost_full=0, full=1

tests.name: test_almost_empty_threshold
tests.description: Verify almost_empty flag at count=1
steps: Read one more, verify almost_empty=0, empty=1

tests.name: test_simultaneous_rw_normal
tests.description: Simultaneous read and write in normal state
steps: Verify both operations complete, count unchanged

tests.name: test_simultaneous_rw_when_full
tests.description: Simultaneous read and write when FIFO is full
steps: Verify write succeeds (enabled by concurrent read)
tests.expected: Write allowed due to simultaneous read, count stays DEPTH

tests.name: test_simultaneous_rw_when_empty
tests.description: Simultaneous read and write when FIFO is empty
steps: Verify read succeeds (enabled by concurrent write)
tests.expected: Read allowed due to simultaneous write, count stays 0

tests.name: test_write_pointer_wrap
tests.description: Verify write pointer wraps correctly at DEPTH-1
steps: Write DEPTH items (with concurrent reads to prevent full)
Verify wr_ptr wraps from DEPTH-1 to 0

tests.name: test_read_pointer_wrap
tests.description: Verify read pointer wraps correctly at DEPTH-1
steps: Verify rd_ptr wraps from DEPTH-1 to 0

tests.name: test_pointer_relationship
tests.description: Verify pointer difference matches count
steps: Verify count always matches (wr_ptr - rd_ptr) mod DEPTH

tests.name: test_data_pattern_walking_ones
tests.description: Write walking ones pattern, verify on read
steps: Write 2^DATA_WIDTH patterns with single bit set

tests.name: test_data_pattern_walking_zeros
tests.description: Write walking zeros pattern, verify on read
steps: Write 2^DATA_WIDTH patterns with single bit clear

tests.name: test_data_pattern_all_ones
tests.description: Write all-ones pattern

tests.name: test_data_pattern_all_zeros
tests.description: Write all-zeros pattern

tests.name: test_fifo_ordering
tests.description: Verify strict FIFO ordering
steps: Read and verify order matches write order

tests.name: test_rapid_fill_drain
tests.description: Rapidly fill and drain FIFO multiple times
steps: Repeat 100 times: fill completely, drain completely
Verify no data corruption or flag errors

tests.name: test_random_operations
tests.description: Random mix of read/write operations
steps: Verify data integrity and flag correctness
tests.expected: No protocol violations or data corruption

tests.name: test_alternating_rw
tests.description: Alternating single read and write
steps: Write one, read one, repeat 1000 times

tests.name: test_reset_during_write
tests.description: Assert reset during write operation
tests.expected: FIFO resets cleanly, no partial writes

tests.name: test_reset_during_read
tests.description: Assert reset during read operation

tests.name: test_reset_when_full
tests.description: Reset FIFO when full
tests.expected: FIFO empty after reset, all pointers zero

tests.name: test_multiple_resets
tests.description: Multiple consecutive reset assertions

assertion_checklist: No write when full without concurrent read
No read when empty without concurrent write
Pointers always in valid range [0, DEPTH-1]
Full and empty mutually exclusive (except corner cases)
Data integrity on read matches written data
